_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: clear that up

sentences.en: Yeah, sure, Mr. Underwear, was it?
★ Yeah, I wanted to clear that up with you, because I'm really sorry about that.
sentences.ko: ★ 네, 그 오해를 좀 풀고 싶었어요. 정말 미안해서요.

sentences.en: It was a really stupid thing to do... crawl up a Ferris wheel to talk to somebody.
sentences.ko: 말 걸겠다고 관람차에 기어올라간 건 진짜 멍청한 짓이었죠.
